metaData.Ingredients:
• Shrimp Wonton: Farm-Raised Shrimp (Litopenaeus Vannamei), Water, Wheat Flour, Tapioca Starch, Stabilizer (E1420), Sesame Oil, Salt, Acidity regulator (E500I, E451I), Sugar, Wheat Gluten, White Pepper Powder
• Tom Yum Paste: Sugar, Lemongrass, Salt, Galangal, Soybean Oil, Anchovy Fish, Dehydrated Red Chilli, Tamarind, Shallot, Acidity Regulator (E330,E260), Water, Kaffir Lime Peel, Flavour Enhancer (E627, E631), Kaffir Lime Leaf, Colour (E160c), Green Tea, Multodextrin

metaData.Key Information: This popular shrimp delicacy that contains no added preservatives keeps you warm and slurping. Each bowl comes with a packet of chicken soup powder for convenient cooking. You will be enjoying this product in no time.
metaData.Preparation:
• Cooking Instructions:
1. Add tom yum paste into the bowl and add water into the indicated line
2. Cover the bowl loosely to let
3. Microwave on high (900 - 1000 watts) for 2.30 - 3 minutes
Carefully remove from microwave as product is hot

metaData.Preparation:
• To make Soup:

2. Stir to dissolve soup powder
• To make Shrimp Wontons:

3. Boil for 3.30 to 4 minutes
4. Remove from water and place in soup

metaData.Preparation:
Cook from frozen. Do not thaw
Deep Fry: Deep fry Chicken Popcorn at 180°C for approximately 3 - 4 minutes or until crispy.

Air Fryer: Place frozen Chicken Popcorn in a frying basket and fry at 200℃ for 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown.

Toaster Oven: Preheat oven at 200°C and place Popcorn Chicken on the toaster rack and heat for 14-16 minutes.

Conditions may vary due to different brands of cooking equipment used.

metaData.Ingredients: Chicken, Wheat Flour, Cabbage, Water, Pork Fat, Modified Starch, Spring Onion, Soy Sauce [Soybean, Sugar, Water, Salt Flavour Enhancer (635)], Soybean Paste (Soybean, Salt, Water, Wheat Flour, Rice Flour, Sugar, Soybean Oil, Garlic, Shallot), Carrot, Sugar, Acidity Regulator (E262(i), E330, 500(i)), Sesame Oil, Salt, Black Pepper, Flavour Enhancer (640), Dextrin, Kombu Seaweed
metaData.Key Information:
- Quality Chicken & Vegetables Wrapped in a Thin Skin
- Quick & Convenient Reheathing via Multiple Methods (Microwave, Boil, Steam, Air Fry, Pan Fry)
- Ready in Under 3 Minutes
metaData.Preparation:
• Microwave:
1. Place Gyoza on a microwave dish
2. Add water to reach 1/4 of the gyoza
3. Cover and microwave for 2 to 2.30 minutes at 800 watts
4. Discard water after cooking
• Pan fry:
1. Add 1 teaspoon of vegetable oil into a frying pan and arrange Gyoza into pan
2. Cook over medium heat until bottoms are golden brown
3. Add 1/3 cup of water into frying pan and cover for about 5 minutes
4. Remove cover once water has evaporated and cook until the bottoms are brown and crispy
• Deep fry:
Deep fry Gyoza at 170°C to 180°C for 2.30 to 3 minutes or until golden brown
• Steam:
Steam Gyoza in tray at 90°C to 95°C for 7 to 8 minutes
• Boil:
Boil Gyoza in hot water or soup for 2.30 to 3 minutes
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep frozen at -18°C or below
• Do not refreeze after defrosting
